text:
EVANGELION ETERNALLY is a single by Yoko Takahashi. The single was published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number KICM-3378, it was released on 10 May 2023. https://vgmdb.net/album/127147 It contains the Promotion Song https://news.kingrecords.co.jp/2023/03/11948/ of the S.J.H.U. PROJECT Shin Universe Robo, a Shin Japan Heroes Universe x Bandai Namco project. https://vgmdb.net/album/127147
